query:
ALTER TABLE users 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS creditBalance INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS freeCreditsToday INT DEFAULT 5 NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lastFreeCreditsReset TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS monthlyCreditsRemaining INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS monthlyCreditsTotal INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lastMonthlyReset TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL;
command:

ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lastFreeCreditsReset TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS monthlyCreditsRemaining INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS monthlyCreditsTotal INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lastMonthlyReset TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL;
